text.title: Experiment Verdict Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for one verdict card. Validator enforces 5-verdict enum + secondary handling + learning + routed action.

example.code: { "experiment_id": "EXP-2026-Q2-031", "hypothesis": "Shortening the hero copy increases primary CTA clicks for cold pricing traffic.", "arms": ["control", "B-short"], "primary": {"metric": "cta_ctr", "lift_pct": 6.2, "ci": [2.1, 10.3], "p_value": 0.004}, "secondary": [{"metric": "signup_cr", "result": "-1.8% NS"}, {"metric": "d7_retention", "result": "flat"}], "verdict": "ship-treatment", "exec_sign_off": null, "learning": {"claim": "Shorter hero copy on cold pricing traffic improves CTA CTR with no clear bottom-of-funnel regression.", "confidence": "moderate"}, "routed": {"owner": "@marina", "target_date": "2026-05-23", "ticket": "REL-1402"}, "closed_at": "2026-05-20T17:00:00Z" }

example.note: verdict not in 5-enum; routed.owner = "team"; missing hypothesis / primary / secondary / learning / closed_at.

list.item: verdict="ship-treatment" with any secondary "regression" string AND no exec_sign_off (rule secondary-metric-gate).
learning.claim < 20 chars or confidence outside {weak, moderate, strong} (rule captured-learning).
